message:
test(bd-35aa): add 33 unit tests for rate_limiting.rs

Cover TokenBucketRateLimiter multi-consume, over-capacity, capacity cap,
drain; SlidingWindowRateLimiter debug, denied-not-counted; both middleware
Debug impls, construction defaults, burst_capacity with/without global mode,
client_id_extractor returning Some/None, per-client without extractor,
error messages for global/per-client/seconds/minutes display, and internal
get_or_create_limiter / is_request_allowed methods. Server crate: 753 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
